description_long: This nightclub features a long, rectangular layout with a modern industrial aesthetic, characterized by a mix of exposed brick, concrete, and dark paneling. The front facade includes large glass windows and a prominent sign above the entrance, flanked by vertical black columns. Inside, the space is divided into several distinct areas, including a main dance floor, lounge seating, and private rooms, all visible through the open-plan design. The flooring appears to be a combination of dark wood and tile, while the walls alternate between brick, patterned wallpaper, and sleek black surfaces. The rear section of the building is more enclosed, likely housing VIP or private areas, with minimal exterior windows. Decorative lighting and signage add to the vibrant, urban nightlife atmosphere.
description: A modern, rectangular nightclub with exposed brick, glass, and dark paneling, featuring a prominent entrance and open-plan interior with lounge and dance areas.
description_view_0: This view highlights the long side of the nightclub, showing the mix of brick and black paneling, as well as the main entrance area with large windows and signage.
description_view_1: From this angle, the interior layout is more visible, revealing lounge seating, the dance floor, and the open-plan arrangement with various rooms.
description_view_2: The rear view shows a mostly enclosed black facade with minimal windows, suggesting private or VIP areas at the back of the nightclub.
description_view_3: This perspective focuses on the front entrance, showcasing the glass doors, signage, and the architectural details of the facade, including vertical columns and decorative elements.
attribute_signage: A large, rectangular sign above the main entrance displays the nightclub's name in gold letters on a black background, framed by metallic trim. The sign is centered and illuminated, making it highly visible from the street.
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrance features double glass doors set within a wide, black-framed opening. Vertical black columns and concrete side panels flank the doors, while the entrance is topped by a prominent illuminated sign. The entryway is flush with the sidewalk, with no visible steps or ramps.
